name: strike
description: Board-and-card workflow skills for turning rough project ideas into scoped implementation, review, acceptance, and retro artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Project workflow skills for durable planning, implementation, review, and acceptance
interface.longDescription: Strike packages a board-and-card workflow for agent-assisted project delivery. Use it to start project cards, sharpen rough ideas, make decisions, research only where useful, write specs, slice implementation phases, build, review, accept, and capture retros while keeping runtime state in the consuming repository.
defaultPrompt: Start a Strike card for this project idea.
Show the next Strike step for this card.
Use Strike to plan and implement this project.
